summary: This document is a software test report detailing performance metrics, compliance checks, and identified issues for the AI phone agent system. It outlines test scenarios regarding transcription accuracy and latency, alongside security compliance verification like AES-256 encryption. The file concludes with raw conversation logs containing identifiable patient names and medical symptoms used for testing purposes.
